prompt: Create a gritty dark-fantasy anime illustration of a muscular blond treasure hunter sitting confidently on a large wooden treasure chest in a dim, ruined vault overflowing with gold coins, jewels, goblets, and scattered valuables. The character is a tall, athletic, broad-shouldered male with messy long dirty blond hair, tan skin, scratched and dirty arms, and a rugged pirate-like outfit: open black-brown leather vest with crossing straps over a bare chest, multiple belts and brass buckles, black fitted pants, tall worn leather boots, leather wrist wraps, armbands, chains, rings, and a dark green pendant necklace. Pose him in a relaxed dominant seated posture, one arm braced behind him on the treasure chest, one knee raised, one hand resting loosely over the raised knee, viewed from a slightly high angle in a vertical portrait composition. Cover the entire face with a centered opaque square censor block in muted brown, leaving hair and body visible. The environment should feel grimy and aged, with wet stone walls, tarnished metal, dust, mud, scratches, and chaotic piles of treasure surrounding him. Use a moody palette of black, bronze, dark gold, brown, and smoky gray, with dim warm highlights glinting off coins and gems. Style: detailed semi-realistic anime fantasy art with intentionally degraded low-quality texture, noisy grain, muddy contrast, rough brushwork, dirty smudges, imperfect anatomy, cluttered details, and a corrupted generated-image feel rather than clean polished artwork. No text, no watermark, no clean modern objects.
